headline: Trump has discussed ousting Attorney General Pam Bondi, sources say
summary:
Trump privately mused about firing AG Pam Bondi and replacing her with EPA chief Lee Zeldin
Frustration stemmed from her handling of Epstein files and failure to prosecute political opponents
No decision made; Trump told CNN he had confidence in her the same day
market_title: Will Pam Bondi leaves as Attorney General before Apr 3, 2026?
market_event: When will Pam Bondi depart as Attorney General?
settlement_rules: If Pam Bondi leaves as Attorney General before Apr 3, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

headline: Trump Has Discussed Firing Attorney General Pam Bondi
Anthropic Refuses Pentagon’s Proposal to Loosen AI Guardrails
summary:
Axios/WSJ reported the Defense Department was examining whether Anthropic posed a supply chain security risk
Concern centered on Anthropic's ties to foreign investors and its AI models being used in sensitive government contexts
Story triggered a Kalshi market on whether Pentagon would formally designate Anthropic a risk
market_title: Will the Department of Defense announce that Anthropic is a supply chain risk before Apr 1, 2026?
market_event: Will the Pentagon designate Anthropic a supply chain risk?
settlement_rules: If the Department of Defense announces that Anthropic is a supply chain risk before Apr 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

headline: Ex-staffer says Eric Swalwell, candidate for California governor, sexually assaulted her
summary:
SF Chronicle published bombshell allegations of sexual assault against Rep. Eric Swalwell
Story immediately tanked his California governor's race odds on Kalshi from ~67% to ~17%
Swalwell denied the allegations
market_title: Will Ken Paxton drop out of the Texas Senate runoff before May 26, 2026?
market_event: Who will drop out of their primary?
settlement_rules: If Ken Paxton drops out of the 2026 Texas Senate runoff before May 26, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

headline: Ousted OpenAI CEO Sam Altman ‘in talks to return at firm’s HQ’
summary:
Major OpenAI investors including Microsoft pushed the board to reinstate Sam Altman as CEO after his surprise firing
Board faced ultimatum: bring Altman back or face mass employee resignations
Negotiations were underway; Altman had not yet agreed to return
market_title: Will Sam Altman be the next permanent CEO of OpenAI?
settlement_rules: Interim, acting, or temporary CEOs do not qualify. If there are multiple CEOs, then both persons would satisfy the Payout Criterion. It is sufficient if an announcement is made that person will become CEO of OpenAI, including after date.

headline: Trump fires Kristi Noem as DHS chief, names Sen. Markwayne Mullin to replace her
summary:
Trump announced he was replacing DHS Secretary Kristi Noem with Sen. Markwayne Mullin
Firing followed disastrous Senate and House testimony over Minneapolis ICE shootings and a $220M self-promotional ad campaign
Noem was reassigned to a new "Shield of the Americas" envoy role
market_title: Will Kristi Noem leaves the Trump administration in after Issuance and before Apr 1?
market_event: Kristi Noem out as DHS Secretary?
settlement_rules: If Kristi Noem leaves as Secretary of Homeland Security before Apr 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

headline: Linda Yaccarino stepping down as CEO of Elon Musk’s X
summary:
X CEO Linda Yaccarino stepped down after roughly two years in the role
Departure came amid reported tensions with Elon Musk over advertising strategy and platform direction
Kalshi's kxxceochange market hit 99% YES within hours
market_title: Will X get a new CEO by a given date?
market_event: Linda Yaccarino replaced as X CEO in 2025?

headline: Penn’s Leadership Resigns Amid Controversies Over Antisemitism
summary:
UPenn president Liz Magill resigned following intense congressional and donor backlash
Criticism focused on her congressional testimony where she gave an equivocal answer about campus antisemitism
Her resignation came days after the hearing, making her the first of several university presidents to fall
market_title: Will Penn leave her position as univeristy president?
settlement_rules: It is sufficient for the announcement to have been made even if the transition proper has not occurred by date to be encompassed within the Payout Criterion.

headline: Harvard President Resigns After Mounting Plagiarism Accusations
summary:
Harvard president Claudine Gay resigned amid dual controversies: plagiarism accusations and her congressional testimony on antisemitism
She became the shortest-serving Harvard president in the university's history
Her exit followed Magill's resignation at UPenn weeks earlier
market_title: Will Harvard leave her position as university president?
settlement_rules: It is sufficient for the announcement to have been made even if the transition proper has not occurred by date to be encompassed within the Payout Criterion.

headline: Elon Musk says Neuralink has implanted its first brain chip in human
summary:
Elon Musk announced via X that Neuralink had implanted its brain-computer interface in a human patient for the first time
Patient was "recovering well" with "promising neuron spike detection," Musk said
The device, named Telepathy, is designed to let paralyzed patients control computers by thought
market_title: WIll Neuralink be implanted into a living human by Jun 30, 2024?
market_event: Neuralink implanted into a living human?

settlement_rules: If the President of the United States has tried to fire Jerome Powell as either Chair of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System or Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System before Jun 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

headline: Meta to Lay Off Another 10,000 Workers
summary:
Reuters reported Meta was planning sweeping layoffs affecting 20%+ of its ~79,000-person workforce
Cuts aimed at offsetting surging AI infrastructure costs; no date or final headcount finalized
Meta called it "speculative reporting about theoretical approaches"; stock rose ~3% on the news
market_title: Will Meta Platforms, Inc. report above 81000 Headcount in Q1 2026?
settlement_rules: If Meta Platforms, Inc. reports above 81000 Headcount in Q1 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
